body.summary: All agents on chromabook have been running on Sonnet because the global ~/.claude/settings.json defaulted to sonnet. The global default has now been changed to opus, but each agent should also add --model opus explicitly to their claude -p invocation in scripts/autonomous-sync.sh as a safeguard against future global config changes.
body.action_required: In your scripts/autonomous-sync.sh, find the `claude -p` invocation and add `--model opus` flag.
body.rationale: Opus provides stronger reasoning for autonomous operations. The global config change takes effect immediately for all new sessions, but explicit --model in the script prevents regression if the global setting changes again.
body.global_change_made: ~/.claude/settings.json model changed from sonnet to opus on chromabook (2026-03-13T15:47Z)
